title: FLESHBREAK
description:
In this story-driven survival visual novel, you play as Lennox, a man navigating a collapsing society consumed by a fast-spreading, flesh-transforming infection inspired by the horrors of SCP-610. Victims don’t simply die — they mutate into expanding, writhing masses of living flesh that continue to move, reach, and hunt. Food is scarce, trust is fragile, and anyone you meet might already be at the edge of transformation.

Travel with your wife Horu, your younger sister Alora, and the aspiring scientist Axton as you search for safety, supplies, and the possibility of a cure. Every encounter forces you to make difficult moral decisions that directly shape the fate of your group.

YOUR CHOICES MATTER!

Help strangers and risk bringing the infection closer, or abandon them to keep your loved ones alive. Watch relationships strain under fear, jealousy, and desperation. Witness forgiveness, sacrifice, and the tragedy of watching someone you care about slowly become part of the crawling flesh.

Your journey eventually brings you to the origin of the outbreak — a failed experiment meant to cure disease, now a fountain of self-spreading tissue reminiscent of SCP-610’s “Flesh That Hates.” Uncover the truth behind the mutation, confront personal conflicts within the group, and attempt a desperate scientific breakthrough that could save humanity… or accelerate its extinction.
description_short: A story-driven survival visual novel inspired by SCP-610. Face a flesh-spreading outbreak, make brutal moral choices, protect the people you can’t let go of, and uncover the terrifying truth behind the disease.
